title: Adding Documents to a Group
excerpt: It would be really awesome if a feature could be created so that we are able to add document(s) (or links) to a group as a whole instead of creating a separate item line inside the group to add the file/link. Not only wo…

posts.author: Nor_R (Nor Ramaj)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really awesome if a feature could be created so that we are able to add document(s) (or links) to a group as a whole instead of creating a separate item line inside the group to add the file/link. Not only would it look cleaner, but it has a lot of potential with automations I think!
